summary: Phase 9 testing completed successfully. All 4 new features (PDF extraction, BSE prices, Watchlist/Portfolio, Signal Alerts) are working correctly. 23/23 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with responsive design.

minor.issue: May return empty arrays outside market hours - expected behavior

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns {status: 'ok', service: 'BMIA'}
Backend: GET /api/guidance/stats regression - 1,285 announcements, 264 stocks
Backend: GET /api/market/overview regression - working
Backend: GET /api/guidance/pdf/stats - returns PDF extraction stats (total_filings_with_pdf, pdfs_processed, pdfs_with_text, pdfs_pending, total_chunks)
Backend: POST /api/guidance/pdf/process - triggers manual PDF processing
Backend: GET /api/bse/quote/500325 - returns BSE quote for Reliance (scrip_code, ltp, change, change_pct, high, low)
Backend: GET /api/bse/quote/500180 - returns BSE quote for HDFC Bank
Backend: GET /api/bse/gainers - returns top BSE gainers
Backend: GET /api/bse/losers - returns top BSE losers
Backend: GET /api/bse/near-52w/high - returns stocks near 52-week high
Backend: GET /api/bse/near-52w/low - returns stocks near 52-week low
Backend: GET /api/bse/advance-decline - returns BSE advance/decline data
Backend: GET /api/watchlist - returns watchlist items
Backend: GET /api/watchlist?with_prices=true - returns watchlist with live BSE prices and P&L
Backend: GET /api/watchlist/summary - returns portfolio summary (total_invested, total_value, total_pnl, winners, losers)
Backend: POST /api/watchlist/add - adds stock to watchlist
Backend: PUT /api/watchlist/{symbol} - updates watchlist item
Backend: DELETE /api/watchlist/{symbol} - removes stock from watchlist
Backend: GET /api/signals/alerts - returns recent signal alerts
Backend: GET /api/signals/alerts?since=<timestamp> - filters alerts by time
Backend: GET /api/signals/active regression - working
Backend: GET /api/guidance/stocks - returns stocks for watchlist search
Frontend: Portfolio page accessible at /watchlist
Frontend: Sidebar nav item 'Portfolio' present and working
Frontend: Portfolio summary cards show Invested, Current Value, P&L, Return%, Winners/Losers
Frontend: Watchlist items show symbol, LTP, change%, entry price, qty, P&L
Frontend: Add Stock button opens modal with stock search
Frontend: Stock search in modal filters stocks correctly
Frontend: Manual symbol entry works in Add Stock modal
Frontend: Delete button removes stock from watchlist (visible on hover)
Frontend: Refresh button refreshes prices
Frontend: Toast notifications show on add/delete actions
Frontend: Mobile responsive design working
Frontend: Mobile hamburger menu shows Portfolio nav item
Regression: Guidance page still works correctly (1,285 filings, 264 stocks)
Regression: Market Overview loads correctly with all data
test_credentials: No auth required. LLM key configured in backend/.env as EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
seed_data_creation: Test data: RELIANCE (scrip 500325, entry 1350, qty 10) and HDFCBANK (scrip 500180, entry 1800, qty 5) in watchlist
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 9 features fully tested. PDF extraction daemon running (30 PDFs processed, 555 chunks). BSE price endpoints working (may return empty outside market hours). Watchlist has 2 test stocks (RELIANCE, HDFCBANK) with live P&L calculation. Signal alerts endpoint returns empty if no signals hit targets recently. All Phase 7-8 features (Guidance, AI RAG) remain functional.

pdf_extraction.stats_endpoint: ✅ WORKING - Returns total_filings_with_pdf, pdfs_processed, pdfs_with_text, pdfs_pending, total_chunks
pdf_extraction.daemon: ✅ RUNNING - Background daemon processes PDFs every 5 minutes (30 PDFs, 555 chunks processed)

bse_prices.quote_endpoint: ✅ WORKING - Returns scrip_code, ltp, change, change_pct, high, low, prev_close
bse_prices.gainers_endpoint: ✅ WORKING - Returns top BSE gainers (may be empty outside market hours)
bse_prices.losers_endpoint: ✅ WORKING - Returns top BSE losers (may be empty outside market hours)

watchlist_portfolio.get_with_prices: ✅ WORKING - Returns watchlist with live BSE prices and P&L calculations
watchlist_portfolio.get_summary: ✅ WORKING - Returns portfolio summary (total_invested, total_value, total_pnl, winners, losers)
watchlist_portfolio.add_stock: ✅ WORKING - Adds stock to watchlist with entry_price, quantity, notes

signal_alerts.alerts_endpoint: ✅ WORKING - Returns recent signal alerts (TARGET_HIT, STOP_LOSS_HIT)

frontend_portfolio_page.sidebar_nav: ✅ WORKING - Portfolio nav item in sidebar
frontend_portfolio_page.summary_cards: ✅ WORKING - Shows Invested, Current Value, P&L, Return%, Winners, Losers
frontend_portfolio_page.watchlist_items: ✅ WORKING - Shows symbol, LTP, change%, entry price, qty, P&L
frontend_portfolio_page.add_stock_modal: ✅ WORKING - Opens with stock search and manual entry
frontend_portfolio_page.delete_button: ✅ WORKING - Visible on hover, removes stock

regression.guidance_page: ✅ WORKING - 1,285 filings, 264 stocks, Ask AI button present
regression.market_overview: ✅ WORKING - All market data loading correctly
